TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kinanoka, title = Kinanoka, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kinanoka} }

S.FORM: alang Kinanoka ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Shoufeng, kwara sali buwan nya ga 93 buwan, 249 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 246 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 97%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kinanoka hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kinanoka hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kinanoka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kinanoka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kinanoka hya' ga Pasongan. tay mkyahu' na Kinanoka hya' ga Cidatayay. rekisi kayal kyokay alang Kinanoka ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Kinanoka ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kinanoka ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Shoufeng, kwara sali buwan nya ga 93 buwan, 249 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 246 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 97%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kinanoka hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kinanoka hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kinanoka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kinanoka hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kinanoka hya' ga Pasongan. tay mkyahu' na Kinanoka hya' ga Cidatayay. rekisi kayal kyokay alang Kinanoka ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Kinanoka ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kinanoka ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu s~ɕħou*eŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kinanoka ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na kinanoka ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kinanoka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kinanoka ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kinanoka ħjaʔ ɣa pas~ɕoŋan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kinanoka ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨi*atajaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj alaŋ kinanoka ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan alaŋ kinanoka ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
